Become A Partner

As a transparent and high quality traffic source, Cosmic Rewards is proven to provide strong LTV of users. When you partner with us, your users are rewarded for simply enjoying your app, driving more engagement and increasing lifetime value.

Partner With Us

Our Trusted Partners

Earn more keeping up with our socials

We'd love for you to be a part of our vibrant online community by following us on social media. It's the best way to stay in the loop about all the exciting things happening with our product. You'll get the scoop on our latest updates, fun contests, and a whole lot more.
